mapper.select: SELECT ccup.*, oc.oil_card_no FROM t_car_cost_urea_pay ccup LEFT JOIN t_oil_card oc ON ccup.oil_card_id = oc.oil_card_id WHERE waybill_id = #{waybillId} ORDER BY ccup.create_time DESC

SELECT ccup.*, w.waybill_number, w.container_number, w.route_name, w.business_date, w.load_time, v.vehicle_number, s.short_name, o.order_no, oc.oil_card_no FROM t_car_cost_urea_pay ccup LEFT JOIN t_waybill w ON ccup.waybill_id = w.waybill_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON w.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON w.shipper_id = s.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_order o ON w.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN t_oil_card oc ON ccup.oil_card_id = oc.oil_card_id WHERE ccup.urea_pay_id = #{moduleId}

SELECT ccup.waybill_id, DATE_FORMAT(ccup.create_time, '%Y%m%d') AS `date`, ccup.remark AS summary, ccup.amount AS payAmount, ccup.category_name, w.driver_id, w.vehicle_id FROM t_car_cost_urea_pay ccup LEFT JOIN t_waybill w ON ccup.waybill_id = w.waybill_id WHERE ccup.audit_status = #{auditStatus} AND ccup.waybill_id IN
#{id}

SELECT * FROM t_car_cost_urea_pay WHERE audit_status = #{auditStatus} AND waybill_id IN
#{item}
